title: Fix null pointer dereference in class member trigger expressions

features.name: event trigger on class member accessed via handle
features.description: Code should include an event declared inside a class and accessed through a class handle in an @(event) sensitivity expression within a task

features.name: posedge trigger through virtual interface accessed via class handle
features.description: Code should include a posedge edge trigger on a signal accessed through a virtual interface member of a class handle

features.name: negedge trigger through virtual interface accessed via class handle
features.description: Code should include a negedge edge trigger on a signal accessed through a virtual interface member of a class handle

features.name: fork join_any with trigger expressions evaluated before class construction
features.description: Code should include a fork join_any block containing @() sensitivity expressions on class members where the class is constructed after the fork statement
